title: P.I.G. - Personal Intermediate Groink
body:
**!! ALL VERSIONS CONTAINING JUMPSCARES PRIOR TO V1.5.3 HAVE BEEN ARCHIVED !!**

This mods add a new ~~e̷̛̘̠͇̠̖̫̗̭̭̘͌̓̋̓̃̌̈́̕͝n̷̨̧̡̛̬̠̙͔̱͎̻̯͈̗̗͓̋͗̈́͂̿̃́͗̈͝ę̷̨̫͚̖̞̖̠͕̘̋̿̈̂̌̐̓̌̓͘͝ͅm̵̼̫̞̈́̃͗ỳ̸̩͖̌̇̏̓͆̈́̐̇̂͒͘̚̕͝~~ companion to your game !

The P.I.G. - Personal Intermediate Groink !

Your P.I.G. will help you throughout your adventure and brings joy to your game !

You can get your very own P.I.G. today by downloading the mod !

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This mod adds an entity (the P.I.G.) and it's a pig varient that lurks in your world and sometimes attack. This is supposed to be a horror mod. I will add more content in the future as well as a bossfight, I have many ideas that I think will fit pretty well in this mod.

</details>
